description: Historic moment for NYC. MTA added 1,200 additional scheduled trips every week with frequency improvements on 1, 3, 5, 6, B, C, D, G, J, M, N, and R lines. Benefits estimated 2.9 million subway riders on weekends and ~800,000 riders on weekdays. Over two dozen local and express bus routes to receive additional trips in 2025. Funds accessibility upgrades at several subway stations including Gates Avenue in Brooklyn.

payload.description: Historic moment for NYC. MTA added 1,200 additional scheduled trips every week with frequency improvements on 1, 3, 5, 6, B, C, D, G, J, M, N, and R lines. Benefits estimated 2.9 million subway riders on weekends and ~800,000 riders on weekdays. Over two dozen local and express bus routes to receive additional trips in 2025. Funds accessibility upgrades at several subway stations including Gates Avenue in Brooklyn.

records.raw_text: Congestion Pricing is a historic moment for our city, and come January 5, New York City Transit will be ready to roll. the subway has added 1,200 additional scheduled trips every week, with frequency improvements targeted on off-peak, weekend, and overnight periods. over two dozen local and express bus routes will receive additional trips and improved service in 2025.
